message:
fix: sort healthy clusters first in Cluster Comparison card (#3280)

Clusters are now sorted healthy-first then alphabetical, so the
default 3 clusters shown are the ones most likely to have useful
metrics rather than unreachable ones with zeroed-out data.

Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
